description: SC DHEC: General operating rooms minimum 360 sq ft net clear floor area per FGI 2022 as adopted by South Carolina.
citation: Regulation 61-16 / South Carolina DHEC Health Licensing

description: SC DHEC: Single-bed patient room minimum 120 sq ft clear; two-bed rooms minimum 100 sq ft per patient.
SC DHEC: ICU cubicle minimum 150 sq ft; open-bay ICU minimum 120 sq ft per patient.
SC DHEC: Patient care corridors minimum 8 ft clear width per NFPA 101.
SC DHEC: Surgical suites 20 ACH total, 4 ACH outside air, positive pressure, HEPA-filtered.
SC DHEC: Certificate of Need required for new hospitals, beds, and capital expenditures over $2M threshold. SC Certificate of Need program administered by DHEC.
citation: S.C. Code §44-7-160 — South Carolina Certificate of Need

description: SC DHEC: Emergency treatment rooms minimum 120 sq ft per treatment space per FGI.
